recommendations.title: Summer Camp
recommendations.overview: A group of people have just signed up to be camp Councillors at a foreign country.  They expect the camp to be the place for a memorable summer.  Instead, something strange is going on and some of the campers begin to act strange.  Things go terribly

recommendations.title: Return to Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: When campers and staff at Camp Manabe mysteriously begin disappearing and turning into gruesome corpses, paranoid Ronnie can't shake the memory of a series of grisly murders that took place at Camp Arawak two decades earlier.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp III: Teenage Wasteland
recommendations.overview: Psychotic Angela is itching to do what she does best: slaughter dozens of teenage campers. As luck would have it, the previous site of her murders has been renamed and converted into an experimental summer camp meant to bring together privileged and

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers
recommendations.overview: Angela Baker escapes from a mental hospital and surfaces at a summer camp as a counselor who lectures her teenage charges on proper moral behavior. Those teens who break her strict rules -- from the camp chatterbox or a sex-obsessed girl to the boys

recommendations.title: Donnie Darko
recommendations.overview: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a large bunny rabbit that manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

recommendations.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A young girl sent to live with her father and his new girlfriend discovers creatures in her new home who want to claim her as one of their own.

recommendations.title: Titane
recommendations.overview: A woman with a metal plate in her head from a childhood car accident embarks on a bizarre journey, bringing her into contact with a firefighter who's reunited with his missing son after 10 years.

recommendations.title: Ghost Ship

recommendations.title: Just Before Dawn
